interaction_relations.description: Explicit spoken content by a character. For monologue/self-talk, target object can be empty. If target is an Object, it must be an interactive/agentive object (e.g., robot/AI/system agent), not passive props like curtains, doors, or scenery items.

samples.subject: Indian Scientist
samples.content: The scientist explains neural signal principles to the medical robot.

samples.subject: Benny
samples.content: Keep walking. Do not look back.

interaction_relations.description: Action-level interaction between Character/Object entities, with polarity label. If the target is an Object, it must be an interactive/agentive object (e.g., robot/AI agent/system entity); passive props or environment objects should not be used as object.

samples.subject: Researchers
samples.content: Researchers inspect and discuss the subject's neural data.

samples.subject: Captain Zhao
samples.content: Captain Zhao pats Engineer Lin on the shoulder to show support.
